versions.version_description: This is based off of the finger picking. Tutorial: (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rh5fE8yUvW8).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Homesick
Kane Brown
Capo 1

[Intro]
 [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
 Dancing in the kitchen, you singing my favorite song[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
 Swinging on the front porch, just laughing at the dogs[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Now you swear you love me more, when you whispering goodnight[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
 All those little moments, are every reason why[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]D[/ch]
 I'm homesick, this feeling that I'm feeling no it don't quit[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]Em7[/ch]
 It's like half of me is missing, heaven knows it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
 That all I wanna do is be alone with[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
 Your brown eyes and tangled up just holding[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Em7[/ch]
 On to you tonight until the morning[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
 Baby, that's the damn truth[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 If home is where the heart is I'm homesick for you[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
 Well it says Kane Brown on a sign with a line out the door[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
 Sold out some little town I never been before[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em7[/ch]
 Yeah, they're screaming my name, this is what we dreamed about[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
 But out here singing 'bout you baby, all I'm thinking 'bout is how[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]D[/ch]
 I'm homesick, this feeling that I'm feeling no it don't quit[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]Em7[/ch]
 It's like half of me is missing, heaven knows it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
 That all I wanna do is be alone with[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
 Your brown eyes and tangled up just holding[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Em7[/ch]
 On to you tonight until the morning[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
 Baby, that's the damn truth[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 If home is where the heart is I'm homesick for you[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
 Homesick for you, yeah, yeah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]D[/ch]
 I'm homesick, this feeling that I'm feeling no it don't quit[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]Em7[/ch]
 It's like half of me is missing, heaven knows it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
 That all I wanna do is be alone with[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
 Your brown eyes and tangled up just holding[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Em7[/ch]
 On to you tonight until the morning[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
 Baby, that's the damn truth[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
 If home is where the heart is I'm homesick for you[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
 I'm homesick for you, yeah yeah[/tab]
